title: Inspiring Tagline
scenario: Create an inspiring tagline for a wellness retreat center that offers holistic healing and self-discovery programs. The tagline should convey a sense of empowerment and transformation. Use a combination of words and phrases to create a memorable and impactful tagline. The tagline should be at least 10 words but no more than 15 words.
constraints: Must be at least 10 words but no more than 15 words
Must convey a sense of empowerment and transformation

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the tagline convey a sense of empowerment?
Does the tagline meet the specified constraints (length and tone)?
Is the tagline memorable and impactful?
